name: Ban Loong Holdings Limited
summary: Ban Loong Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the money lending, and trading of goods and commodities in Hong Kong and the People's Republic of China. The company operates through Money Lending and Trading Segments. It provides short-term personal and corporate loans; and trades in refined edible oil, sugar, cosmetic, and personal care products. The company was formerly known as ABC Communications (Holdings) Limited and changed its name to Ban Loong Holdings Limited in October 2015. Ban Loong Holdings Limited is based in Wan Chai, Hong Kong.
